title: Gilded Saturation
body:
Replaces [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) saturation bar with golden ham shanks, reusing textures from [Meal API](https://modrinth.com/mod/mealapi) custom food bar!

 

## Dependencies [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)/ or [AppleCore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/applecore) You must install the mentioned **mod** for pack to work. pack still changes hunger poison bar from vanilla though ## Features Food value look !!! ![Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b1acf15b895b96a52a7844369b40605bcfe1b31.png) ![Rotten Flesh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b98f018c2b8b5e32f054166e731bd4541d20e704.png) Saturation bar !!! ![Gilded Saturation bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b4ffc40c1a29c2056f959d3d5c44cbef2a3049c.gif) --- Please check out [Meal API](https://modrinth.com/mod/mealapi)!
